channel.title: Joomla! Project — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Joomla! Project (joomla).

item.title: CVE-2026-48906 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Extension - tassos.gr - Arbitrary File Deletion in Novarain/Tassos Framework < 6.1.0 for Joomla
item.description: The vulnerability in the Tassos Framework Plugin allows users to delete arbitrary files on the affected sites.

item.title: CVE-2026-35221 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260506] - Authenticated blind SQLi in com_finder
item.description: Improperly built filter clauses lead to a SQL injection vulnerability in the search query for com_finder.

item.title: CVE-2026-48903 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Joomla! Framework - [20260519] - Inadequate content filtering within the checkAttribute filter code.
item.description: Inadequate content filtering within the checkAttribute methods leads to XSS vulnerabilities in various components.

item.title: CVE-2026-48896 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Core - [20260511] - MFA Authentication Bypass
item.description: Insufficient state checks lead to a vector that allows to bypass 2FA checks.

item.title: CVE-2026-35220 · 4.6 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260505] - CSRF in user activation endpoint
item.description: Lack of CSRF token validation lead to a CSRF attack vector in the admin activation endpoint of com_users.

item.title: CVE-2026-40383 · 7.5 HIGH — Joomla! Core - [20260509] - LFI in HTMLView layout parameter
item.description: An improper validation of user-supplied input leads to a local file inclusion vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-35222 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260507] - Authenticated blind SQLi in com_tags
item.description: Improperly validated order clauses lead to a SQL injection vulnerability in com_tags.

item.title: CVE-2026-40384 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260510] - Path traversal in com_media webservice endpoint
item.description: An improper validation of the search parameter of the com_media files API endpoint leads to a path traversal vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-48905 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Joomla! Framework - [20260520] - Inadequate content filtering within the cleanAttributes filter code.
item.description: Lack of input filtering leads to an XSS vector in the HTML filter code.

item.title: CVE-2026-48897 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Core - [20260512] - MFA Authentication Bypass
item.description: Insufficient state checks lead to a vector that allows to bypass 2FA checks.

item.title: CVE-2026-25901 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260502] - XSS in com_associations
item.description: Lack of output escaping leads to a XSS vector in the multilingual associations component.

item.title: CVE-2026-48899 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260515] - Incorrect Access Control in sample data plugins
item.description: An improper access check allows privilege escalation through the com_users batch task.

item.title: CVE-2026-48900 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260516] - Incorrect Access Control in com_scheduler
item.description: An improper access check allowed low privileged users to edit the task types of existing scheduler tasks.

item.title: CVE-2026-48902 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Joomla! Core - [20260518] - Transport encryption downgrade for password and username reset links
item.description: The password and username reset features created plain http links for https connections if the "Force SSL" flag wasn't explicitly set.

item.title: CVE-2026-35223 · 8.6 HIGH — Joomla! Core - [20260508] - Improper access check in com_config webservice endpoints
item.description: An improper access check allows unauthorized access to com_config webservice endpoints.

item.title: CVE-2026-25900 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260501] - XSS in feed modules
item.description: Lack of output escaping leads to a XSS vector in the feed modules.

item.title: CVE-2026-48904 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Core - [20260514] - Privilege escalation through com_users webservice endpoints
item.description: An improper access check allows privelege escalation through the com_users group editing webservice endpoint.

item.title: CVE-2026-30895 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260504] - XSS in readmore links
item.description: Lack of output escaping leads to a XSS vector in the readmore links for com_content.

item.title: CVE-2026-48898 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Core - [20260513] - Privilege escalation through com_users batch task
item.description: An improper access check allows privilege escalation through the com_users batch task.

item.title: CVE-2026-30894 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260503] - XSS in com_contenthistory
item.description: Lack of output escaping leads to a XSS vector in the content history component.

item.title: CVE-2026-48901 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Core - [20260517] - Incorrect Cache Key Construction for InputFilter objects
item.description: The InputFilter::getInstance() method omitted a security sensitive parameter from the instance cache key.

item.title: CVE-2026-23900 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Extension - phoca.cz - Stored XSS vectors in Phoca Maps component 5.0.0 - 6.0.2 for Joomla
item.description: Various stored XSS vulnerabilities in the maps- and icon rendering logic in Phoca Maps component 5.0.0-6.0.2 have been discovered.

item.title: CVE-2026-21630 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260302] - SQL injection in com_content articles webservice endpoint
item.description: Improperly built order clauses lead to a SQL injection vulnerability in the articles webservice endpoint.

item.title: CVE-2026-23898 · 8.6 HIGH — Joomla! Core - [20260305] - Arbitrary file deletion in com_joomlaupdate
item.description: Lack of input validation leads to an arbitrary file deletion vulnerability in the autoupdate server mechanism.

item.title: CVE-2026-21629 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Joomla! Core - [20260301] - ACL hardening in com_ajax
item.description: The ajax component was excluded from the default logged-in-user check in the administrative area. This behavior was potentially unexpected by 3rd party developers.

item.title: CVE-2026-23899 · 8.6 HIGH — Joomla! Core - [20260306] - Improper access check in webservice endpoints
item.description: An improper access check allows unauthorized access to webservice endpoints.

item.title: CVE-2026-21631 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260303] - XSS vector in com_associations comparison view
item.description: Lack of output escaping leads to a XSS vector in the multilingual associations component.

item.title: CVE-2026-21632 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260304] - XSS vectors in various article title outputs
item.description: Lack of output escaping for article titles leads to XSS vectors in various locations.

item.title: CVE-2026-21628 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Extension - astroidframe.work - Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution in Astroid Framework 2.0.0 - 3.3.10 for Joomla
item.description: A improperly secured file management feature allows uploads of dangerous data types for unauthenticated users, leading to remote code execution.

item.title: CVE-2026-21627 · 9.5 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Extension - tassos.gr - SQL injection and Unauthenticated File Read in Novarain/Tassos Framework v4.10.14 – v6.0.37 for Joomla
item.description: The vulnerability was rooted in how the Tassos Framework plugin handled specific AJAX requests through Joomla’s com_ajax entry point. Under certain conditions, internal framework functionality could be invoked without proper restriction.

item.title: CVE-2026-21626 · 9.2 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Extension - stackideas.com - Information disclosure in post custom fields in EasyDiscuss 1.0.0-5.0.15 for Joomla
item.description: Access control settings for forum post custom fields are not applied to the JSON output type, leading to an ACL violation vector an information disclosure

item.title: CVE-2026-21625 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Extension - stackideas.com - Lack of mime type validation in EasyDiscuss component 1.0.0-5.0.15 for Joomla
item.description: User provided uploads to the Easy Discuss component for Joomla aren't properly validated. Uploads are purely checked by file extensions, no mime type checks are happening.

item.title: CVE-2026-21624 · 9.4 CRITICAL — Extension - stackideas.com - Persistent XSS in EasyDiscuss component 1.0.0-5.0.15 for Joomla
item.description: Lack of input filterung leads to a persistent XSS vulnerability in the user avatar text handling of the Easy Discuss component for Joomla.

item.title: CVE-2026-21623 · 9.4 CRITICAL — Extension - stackideas.com - Persistent XSS in EasyDiscuss component 1.0.0-5.0.15 for Joomla
item.description: Lack of input filterung leads to a persistent XSS vulnerability in the forum post handling of the Easy Discuss component for Joomla.

item.title: CVE-2025-63082 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260101] - Inadequate content filtering for data URLs
item.description: Lack of input filtering leads to an XSS vector in the HTML filter code related to data URLs in img tags.

item.title: CVE-2025-63083 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260102] - XSS vector in the pagebreak plugin
item.description: Lack of output escaping leads to a XSS vector in the pagebreak plugin.

item.title: CVE-2025-55758 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Extension - jdownloads.com - CSRF vectors in jDownloads component 1.0.0 - 4.0.47 for Joomla
item.description: Multiple CSRF attack vectors in JDownloads component 1.0.0-4.0.47 for Joomla were discovered.

item.title: CVE-2025-55757 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Extension - virtuemart.net - XSS in VirtueMart component 1.0.0 - 4.4.10 for Joomla
item.description: A unauthenticated reflected XSS vulnerability in VirtueMart 1.0.0-4.4.10 for Joomla was discovered.

item.title: CVE-2025-54477 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Joomla! Core - [20250902] User-Enumeration in passkey authentication method
item.description: Improper handling of authentication requests lead to a user enumeration vector in the passkey authentication method.

item.title: CVE-2025-54476 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20250901] Inadequate content filtering within the checkAttribute filter code
item.description: Improper handling of input could lead to an XSS vector in the checkAttribute method of the input filter framework class.

item.title: CVE-2025-54300 · 8.5 HIGH — Extension - norrnext.com - Stored XSS vulnerability in Quantum Manager component 1.0.0-3.2.0 for Joomla
item.description: A stored XSS vulnerability in Quantum Manager component 1.0.0-3.2.0 for Joomla was discovered. The SVG upload feature does not sanitize uploads.

item.title: CVE-2025-54301 · 8.5 HIGH — Extension - norrnext.com - Stored XSS vulnerability in Quantum Manager component 1.0.0-3.2.0 for Joomla
item.description: A stored XSS vulnerability in Quantum Manager component 1.0.0-3.2.0 for Joomla was discovered. File names are not properly escaped.

item.title: CVE-2025-54475 · 8.7 HIGH — Extension - joomsky.com - SQL injection in JS jobs component version 1.3.2 - 1.4.4 for Joomla
item.description: A SQL injection vulnerability in the JS Jobs plugin versions 1.3.2-1.4.4 for Joomla allows low-privilege users to execute arbitrary SQL commands.

item.title: CVE-2025-54474 · 8.5 HIGH — Extension - dj-extensions.com - SQLi vulnerability in DJ-Classifieds component 3.9.2-3.10.1 for Joomla
item.description: A SQLi vulnerability in DJ-Classifieds component 3.9.2-3.10.1 for Joomla was discovered. The issue allows privileged users to execute arbitrary SQL commands.

item.title: CVE-2025-54473 · 9.2 CRITICAL — Extension - phoca.cz - Authenticated RCE vulnerability in Phoca Commander component 1.0.0-4.0.0 and 5.0.0-5.0.1 for Joomla
item.description: An authenticated RCE vulnerability in Phoca Commander component 1.0.0-4.0.0 and 5.0.0-5.0.1 for Joomla was discovered. The issue allows code execution via the unzip feature.

item.title: CVE-2025-54299 · 9.4 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Extension - nobossextensions.com - Stored XSS vulnerability in No Boss Testimonials component 1.0.0-3.0.0 and 4.0.0-4.0.2 for Joomla
item.description: A stored XSS vulnerability in No Boss Testimonials component 1.0.0-3.0.0 and 4.0.0-4.0.2 for Joomla was discovered.

item.title: CVE-2025-54298 · 9.4 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Extension - firecoders.com - Stored XSS vulnerability in CommentBox component 1.0.0-1.1.0 for Joomla
item.description: A stored XSS vulnerability in CommentBox component 1.0.0-1.1.0 for Joomla was discovered.

item.title: CVE-2025-54297 · 7 HIGH — Extension - compojoom.com - Stored XSS vulnerability in CComment component 5.0.0-6.1.14 for Joomla
item.description: A stored XSS vulnerability in CComment component 5.0.0-6.1.14 for Joomla was discovered.

item.title: CVE-2025-54294 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Extension - stackideas.com - SQLi vulnerability in Komento component 4.0.0-4.0.7 for Joomla
item.description: A SQLi vulnerability in Komento component 4.0.0-4.0.7for Joomla was discovered. The issue allows unprivileged users to execute arbitrary SQL commands.

item.title: CVE-2025-54295 · 5.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Extension - dj-extensions.com - Reflected XSS vulnerability in DJ-Reviews component 1.0-1.3.6 for Joomla
item.description: A Reflected XSS vulnerability in DJ-Reviews component 1.0-1.3.6 for Joomla was discovered.
